parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'siren', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.siren }] }], properties: ['name', 'siren'], limit: 1 }) }}

={{ (() => { const d = $('Résoudre owner ID').item.json; const props = { name: d.company_name, phone: d.company_phone, website: d.company_website, address: d.company_address, siren: d.siren, siret_siege: d.siret, type_entreprise: d.type_entreprise, numero_tva: d.numero_tva, capital_social: d.capital_social, forme_juridique: d.forme_juridique, ca_decidento: d.chiffre_affaires, effectif_decidento: d.effectif, convention_collective: d.convention_collective, source_decidento_url: d.source_url }; if (d.owner_id) props.hubspot_owner_id = d.owner_id; return JSON.stringify({ properties: props }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'decidento_contact_id', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.decidento_contact_id }] }], properties: ['firstname', 'lastname', 'decidento_contact_id', 'statut_prospection_decidento'], limit: 1 }) }}

={{ (() => { const d = $('Fusionner company_id').first().json; const props = { firstname: d.contact_firstname, lastname: d.contact_lastname, jobtitle: d.contact_position, address: d.contact_address, titre_decidento: d.contact_title_tag, statut_prospection_decidento: d.status_enum, commercial_decidento: d.commercial_enum, source_decidento_url: d.source_url, decidento_contact_id: d.decidento_contact_id }; if (d.contact_email) props.email = d.contact_email; if (d.contact_linkedin) props.hs_linkedin_url = d.contact_linkedin; if (d.owner_id) props.hubspot_owner_id = d.owner_id; return JSON.stringify({ properties: props }); })() }}

={{ (() => { const d = $('Fusionner company_id').first().json; const props = { firstname: d.contact_firstname, lastname: d.contact_lastname, jobtitle: d.contact_position, address: d.contact_address, titre_decidento: d.contact_title_tag, statut_prospection_decidento: d.status_enum, commercial_decidento: d.commercial_enum, source_decidento_url: d.source_url, decidento_contact_id: d.decidento_contact_id }; if (d.contact_email) props.email = d.contact_email; if (d.contact_linkedin) props.hs_linkedin_url = d.contact_linkedin; if (d.owner_id) props.hubspot_owner_id = d.owner_id; return JSON.stringify({ properties: props }); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, contact_id: $('Fusionner contact_id').first().json.contact_id, contact_action: $('Fusionner contact_id').first().json.contact_action, company_id: $('Fusionner contact_id').first().json.company_id, owner_id: $('Résoudre owner ID').first().json.owner_id || 'non trouvé', message: $('Fusionner contact_id').first().json.contact_action === 'updated' ? 'Contact mis à jour et entreprise associée' : 'Contact et entreprise créés/associés avec succès' }) }}
